message:
You know that feeling when you’re all set for a storm, and your friends start to tease you about being the "gloriously over-prepared" one? Yep, that’s me. Last winter, when the forecast called for a mere few inches of snow, I couldn't resist the urge to stock up on extra batteries, snacks, and even a cozy pile of blankets. My family rolled their eyes, but when the snowstorm turned into a full-blown blizzard, they were more than grateful for my little stash! 

It’s funny how being a bit extra can turn into a lifesaver. I realized that preparedness isn’t just about the stuff—it’s about creating a sense of peace and comfort when things get a bit wild outside. 

Have you ever found yourself being the "over-prepared" friend in your circle? What’s your go-to prep item? This little refresher helped me remember the joy in being ready!
